title: SSE stream continues yielding items after SseFrameTooLarge error, contradicting doc
description: client.rs subscribe_events(): the doc says the stream 'terminates' after yielding ClientError::SseFrameTooLarge. The implementation returns Some((Err(SseFrameTooLarge), (stream, buf))) from the unfold closure, which does not terminate the stream — unfold will be polled again on the next next() call. A caller who continues polling after receiving SseFrameTooLarge will get more items (possibly more errors or events from the remaining buffer), not stream termination. The documented contract is broken.
